description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

API for creating, managing, and exporting Camtasia projects programmatically. Provides operations for project lifecycle management including creating projects from templates, managing timeline tracks and media, configuring production settings, and exporting finished videos in various formats.

Contact Support:
 Name: TechSmith Support
 Email: support@techsmith.com
